# Tech Scouting Report MCP

Technology commercialization intelligence for AI agents. Scout 8 data sources in parallel to evaluate research momentum, patent landscape, funding validation, and Technology Readiness Level (TRL). No API key required.

## When to call

Use this MCP when you need to:
- Screen multiple technologies for investment potential
- Evaluate research momentum and citation velocity for a technology
- Assess patent landscape and freedom to operate
- Validate funding signals with NIH/NSF grants and clinical trials
- Determine technology maturity (TRL 1-9) for commercialization
- Generate a comprehensive tech scouting report with composite scores

## Tools

| Tool | Price | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| tech_scout_report | $0.08 | Full scouting report with composite score, verdict, research/patent/funding/TRL breakdown |
| tech_scout_research_momentum | $0.03 | Analyze citation velocity and publication trends from OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, arXiv |
| tech_scout_patent_landscape | $0.02 | Scout USPTO and EPO patent databases for technology patents |
| tech_scout_funding_landscape | $0.03 | Scout NIH, Grants.gov, ClinicalTrials.gov for funding validation signals |
| tech_scout_trl_assessment | $0.03 | Assess Technology Readiness Level via keyword analysis and clinical trial phases |
| tech_scout_batch | $0.08 | Batch scout multiple technologies at once, ranked by composite score |

## Example AI Prompt

"Run a tech scouting report on mRNA therapeutics."

## Example AI Prompt

"Rank these 5 technologies by investment potential: mRNA vaccines, CRISPR, solid-state batteries, quantum computing, neural interfaces."

---

## MCP Server Details

**Endpoint:** `https://tech-scouting-report-mcp.apify.actor/mcp`

## Quick Start

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tech-scouting-report-mcp": {
      "url": "https://tech-scouting-report-mcp.apify.actor/mcp?token=YOUR_APIFY_TOKEN"
    }
  }
}
```

No API key required for most data sources. AI agents can call tools directly via the MCP protocol.

## Data Sources

| Source | Coverage | Auth Required |
|--------|----------|---------------|
| OpenAlex | 250M+ academic papers | No |
| Semantic Scholar | Influential citations | Optional |
| arXiv | Preprints | No |
| USPTO Patents | US patents | No |
| EPO | EU patents | No |
| NIH RePORTER | Federal grants | No |
| Grants.gov | Federal opportunities | No |
| ClinicalTrials.gov | Clinical trials | No |

## Scoring Model

| Score | Verdict | Action |
|-------|---------|--------|
| 75+ | INVEST_NOW | Prioritize licensing discussions |
| 55-74 | STRONG_CANDIDATE | Monitor for patent issuance |
| 35-54 | MONITOR | Track publication velocity |
| 15-34 | TOO_EARLY | Check back in 6-12 months |
| <15 | PASS | Does not meet criteria |

## SEO Keywords

tech scouting MCP, technology commercialization, patent landscape analysis, TRL assessment, technology readiness level, AI agent investment, LLM due diligence, research momentum, funding validation, Claude tech scouting, Cursor VC tools, no API key needed, startup technology assessment, innovation intelligence, venture capital due diligence
